name: Orange-Date Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Grind oats in a blender for about 1 minute, then transfer to a large mixing bowl. Stir in flour and cinnamon. Set aside.
Puree dates with 1/2 cup apple juice, orange juice, orange peel, and vanilla in a food processor or blender until smooth.
Moisten the oat mixture with the remaining 1 1/2 cups apple juice until it forms a stiff dough. Press the dough into the bottom of an 8-inch-square pan lightly oiled for baking.
Spread the date puree evenly on top of the dough.
Bake in the preheated oven for 35 minutes or until the crust is firm. Allow to cool completely before cutting into 2-inch squares. Yield: 16 squares.
